message:
feat(cli,render,ci): add config validation, diff mode improvements, and CI/Pages workflow updates

Extends the CLI with runtime config validation that rejects unsupported
combinations at load time, adds back-edge and minimap plumbing across
render surfaces, and improves the terminal diff mode with structural
comparison. CI and GitHub Pages workflows are updated.

- fm-cli/main.rs: add validate_runtime_config_support() rejecting
  unsupported config combinations (deterministic=false,
  fallback_on_error=false, intent_inference=false); add
  show_back_edges and show_minimap wiring through render options
- fm-cli/tests/integration_test.rs: add integration tests for config
  validation, render pipeline, and CLI flag precedence
- fm-layout/src/lib.rs: extend layout configuration plumbing for
  back-edge display and minimap support
- fm-render-svg/src/lib.rs: expand sequence fragment rendering with
  additional test coverage for nested and edge-case fragments
- fm-render-term/src/diff.rs: add structural diff comparison mode
  with side-by-side output
- fm-render-term/src/renderer.rs: add minimap support field
- fm-render-term/Cargo.toml: add dependency for diff support
- fm-render-canvas/src/renderer.rs: minor canvas renderer adjustment
- .github/workflows/ci.yml: add new CI jobs for config and render
  validation
- .github/workflows/pages.yml: expand Pages deployment workflow
- Update Cargo.lock, README, and beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -165,6 +165,25 @@ jobs:
             exit 1
           fi
 
+  png-smoke:
+    name: PNG Smoke
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Rust Toolchain
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+
+      - name: Cache Cargo Artifacts
+        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Check fm-cli png feature
+        run: cargo check -p fm-cli --features png
+
+      - name: Run png smoke tests
+        run: cargo test -p fm-cli --features png png_ -- --nocapture
+
   golden-checksum-guard:
     name: Golden Checksum Guard
     needs: quality-gate-config

@@ -31,9 +31,11 @@ jobs:
       - name: Assemble static site
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
-          mkdir -p dist/pkg
+          mkdir -p dist/pkg dist/web dist/web_react
           cp frankenmermaid_demo_showcase.html dist/index.html
           cp frankenmermaid_demo_showcase.html dist/frankenmermaid_demo_showcase.html
+          cp web/index.html dist/web/index.html

@@ -49,3 +51,39 @@ jobs:
       - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
         id: deployment
         uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
+
+      - name: Post-deploy smoke check
+        if: success()
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          SITE_URL="${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}"
+          echo "==> Smoke-checking deployed site at $SITE_URL"
+
+          # Wait for CDN propagation
+          sleep 10
+
+          # Check root page loads
+          HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sL -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "$SITE_URL" || echo "000")
+          if [[ "$HTTP_CODE" != "200" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Root page returned HTTP $HTTP_CODE (expected 200)"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          echo "Root page: HTTP $HTTP_CODE ✓"
+
+          # Check WASM artifact is served
+          WASM_CODE=$(curl -sL -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "${SITE_URL}pkg/frankenmermaid_bg.wasm" || echo "000")
+          if [[ "$WASM_CODE" != "200" ]]; then
+            echo "::warning::WASM artifact returned HTTP $WASM_CODE"
+          else
+            echo "WASM artifact: HTTP $WASM_CODE ✓"
+          fi
+
+          # Check showcase page contains expected content
+          BODY=$(curl -sL "$SITE_URL")
+          if echo "$BODY" | grep -q "frankenmermaid"; then
+            echo "Showcase page content: ✓"
+          else
+            echo "::warning::Showcase page missing expected 'frankenmermaid' content"
+          fi
+
+          echo "==> Post-deploy smoke check passed"

 ```
 
+### `fm-cli interactive`
+
+Launch a split-pane terminal editor with live diagram preview.
+
+```bash
+fm-cli interactive input.mmd
+fm-cli interactive input.mmd --theme dark
+```
+
+Keyboard shortcuts: **Ctrl+Q** to quit, **Ctrl+S** to save. Requires a terminal (not available in CI or piped contexts).
+

 ### Pipeline
 
@@ -1625,6 +1641,48 @@ cargo fmt --check

 ```
 
+## Deployment and Rollback
+
+### Demo Surfaces
+
+The project has two deployment targets:
+
+1. **GitHub Pages** (`dicklesworthstone.github.io/frankenmermaid/`): Deployed automatically on push to `main` via `.github/workflows/pages.yml`. Includes the showcase HTML, WASM binary, and web/web_react host pages.
+
+2. **Cloudflare Pages**: Deployed via the CI pipeline with staged smoke checks in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`.
+
+### Post-Deploy Verification
+
+Both deployment paths include automated smoke checks:
+- GitHub Pages: verifies HTTP 200 for root page and WASM artifact after deploy
+- Cloudflare: runs `scripts/cloudflare_pages_ops.py smoke-check` before promoting
+
+### Rollback Procedures
+
+**GitHub Pages rollback:**
+```bash
+# Revert to the previous deployment by re-running the workflow on a known-good commit
+gh workflow run "Deploy GitHub Pages" --ref <known-good-commit-sha>
+
+# Or revert the commit and push
+git revert HEAD
+git push origin main
+```
+
+**Cloudflare Pages rollback:**
+```bash
+# Roll back to previous deployment via Cloudflare dashboard or CLI
+# Cloudflare Pages keeps all deployment versions; select the previous one in the dashboard
+```
+
+**WASM package rollback:**
+```bash
+# Rebuild from a known-good commit
+git checkout <known-good-sha>
+bash build-wasm.sh
+# Re-publish to npm if needed
+```
+
 ## Troubleshooting
